title: Réunion Island Lava Reaches the Sea
description: The February 2026 eruption at Piton de la Fournaise has lasted longer and produced a larger volume of lava than recent eruptions from this frequently active volcano.
content: Located 700 kilometers (440 miles) east of Madagascar, Réunion Island is the product of a long-lived mantle hotspot on the floor of the Indian Ocean. The island first emerged above the oceans surface… [+3868 chars]
de: Lava der Insel Réunion erreicht das Meer. Der Ausbruch am Piton de la Fournaise im Februar 2026 dauerte länger und produzierte eine größere Lavamenge als die jüngsten Ausbrüche dieses häufig aktiven Vulkans.
en: Réunion Island Lava Reaches the Sea. The February 2026 eruption at Piton de la Fournaise has lasted longer and produced a larger volume of lava than recent eruptions from this frequently active volcano.
la: Reunion Island Lava Mare attingit. Februarius 2026 eruptio apud Piton de la Fournaise diutius duravit et maius volumen lavae quam recentes eruptiones ex hoc vulcano saepe activo edidit.

title: Hawaii’s most active volcano Kilauea brewing as experts forecast 44th eruption in coming days
description: According to the USGS, the forecast for the start of episode 44 is between April 6 to April 14.
content:
Hawaii’s most active and popular volcano, Kilauea, is preparing to put on a show as geologists forecast the volcano’s 44th eruption in the coming days.
The United States Geological Survey said that … [+1856 chars]
de: Hawaiis aktivster Vulkan Kilauea braut sich zusammen, da Experten in den kommenden Tagen den 44. Ausbruch vorhersagen. Laut USGS ist der Start von Folge 44 voraussichtlich zwischen dem 6. und 14. April.
en: Hawaii’s most active volcano Kilauea brewing as experts forecast 44th eruption in coming days. According to the USGS, the forecast for the start of episode 44 is between April 6 to April 14.
la: Hawaii est acerrimus vulcano Kilauea medicandi ut periti praenuntiant 44 eruptionem in diebus venientibus. Secundum USGS, praesagio initium eventus 44 inter diem 6 Aprilis ad diem 14 Aprilis est.
